name: Knowledge Kit
description: A Flow Kit for durable, gated knowledge storage. Provides a store contract with defined record types, mutation operations, and provenance rules — plus a default adapter backed by markdown files, YAML frontmatter, wikilinks, and a graph index.

flows.description: Gate that requires contract-suite evidence before a store implementation is accepted.

adapters.description: Default store adapter: markdown files + YAML frontmatter + wikilinks + JSON graph index.

evals.description: Parameterized contract test suite for any Knowledge Kit store adapter.
